footer.tagline: Take back control of your money. LIBERIA helps you rebuild your financial stability, one step at a time.
footer.disclaimer: LIBERIA is a personal piloting tool. Nothing shown here constitutes financial, tax or investment advice.

hero.badge: A new generation of financial piloting
hero.subtitle: LIBERIA helps you understand your finances, lower your stress and build durable stability — without jargon, without shame.
hero.trustSignal: 14 days free · Encrypted data · No ads

problem.title: Money shouldn't be a constant source of stress.

overwhelmed.title: You feel overwhelmed by your finances
overwhelmed.text: Scattered accounts, fuzzy spending, tight month-ends — it's mentally exhausting.

chasing.title: You feel like you're chasing money
chasing.text: You work hard but you can't tell where it actually goes.

direction.title: You have no clear direction
direction.text: You want to move forward, but without a tangible plan every month looks like the last.

solution.title: A calm, readable financial compass, built for humans.
solution.description: LIBERIA brings together your money, your spending and your goals in a single premium interface. You see where you stand, what's weighing you down, and the next concrete step.

score.title: Financial stability score
score.text: A transparent score out of 100 that sums up your balance: income, expenses, savings, emergency fund.

goals.title: Goals that actually matter
goals.text: Emergency fund, debt repayment, first project. Tracked simply, without toxic gamification.

budget.title: Clear monthly budget
budget.text: Your income and expenses sorted automatically by category, with no intrusive bank connection.

leftover.title: Real take-home money
leftover.text: You instantly know what's left after the essentials — and how much you can put aside.

howItWorks.title: Three calm steps to take charge again.

one.title: You map it out
one.text: 5 minutes to describe your situation, your income and your main expenses.

two.title: We compute your stability
two.text: Score, take-home money, stress level, emergency fund — everything becomes legible.

three.title: You move forward step by step
three.text: Concrete goals, month after month, without pressure. You catch your breath.

features.title: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

budget.title: Full budget tracking
budget.text: Income, expenses, essential or pleasure categories.

goals.title: Financial goals
goals.text: Create and track your priorities in a few taps.

savings.title: Piloted savings
savings.text: Your take-home money becomes a real decision variable.

demo.title: Rich demo mode
demo.text: Try everything, without signing up, with realistic data.

coach.title: AI coach included
coach.text: An assistant who understands your numbers and answers without jargon.

security.title: Your data is yours. Period.
security.description: Encrypted storage, strict per-user access via Supabase Row-Level Security, no resale, no ads. LIBERIA doesn't need your bank passwords.

encryption.title: Encryption
encryption.text: TLS connection and encrypted storage at rest.

rls.title: Supabase RLS
rls.text: Each user only sees their own data.

noAggregation.title: No bank aggregation
noAggregation.text: You stay in control of what you enter, with no intrusive middleman.

free.a: There is no permanent free plan. You can try the demo without an account (data entered in demo is not saved). To use LIBERIA for real, you start a 14-day free trial. A card is required at sign-up to activate the trial — no charge during those 14 days. At the end of the trial, the plan you picked kicks in automatically (Standard 14.95 CHF/month or 149 CHF/year, or Premium 24.95 CHF/month or 249 CHF/year). Cancel before the trial ends to pay nothing.

cancelTrial.q: What happens if I cancel during the trial?
cancelTrial.a: No charge. Your access continues until the end of the 14 days, then your account goes on pause — your data stays safe and you can reactivate whenever you want.

payment.a: Visa, Mastercard and American Express cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, plus TWINT (Switzerland, depending on Stripe Dashboard activation). Everything is handled by Stripe — encrypted and PCI-compliant.

bank.q: Is my data connected to my bank?
bank.a: No. LIBERIA works with manual entry to keep you 100% in control. It's mentally healthier and substantially safer.

audience.a: Anyone who wants to get back on their feet financially — from a tight salary to a freelancer who wants to clarify the year, including people in financial recovery.

ai.a: The AI coach is already included: you can discuss your situation, ask for a 30, 60 or 90-day financial plan, and get recommendations matched to your real numbers. No banking data required — you talk to it like to someone who knows your file.

metadata.title: Privacy policy
metadata.description: How LIBERIA treats your data — minimal collection, EU hosting, no resale, full user-side control.

sections.heading: 1. Our principle
sections.html: We collect the minimum needed to run LIBERIA — nothing more. Your data is never sold, never rented, never shared for advertising.

sections.heading: 2. Collected data
sections.html:
Account: email address, hashed password (never stored in clear), optional first name.

Financial data: income, expenses, goals, notes — only what you choose to enter voluntarily. LIBERIA never connects to your bank.

Preferences: coaching style, behavioural profile, traits declared in onboarding, personal notes.

Assistant conversations: your messages and the responses are kept so you can find your history.

Anonymous internal counters: number of sign-ins, feature usage, never-personal aggregates. Can be disabled in your settings.

sections.heading: 3. Hosting and storage
sections.html: Data is stored on the Supabase infrastructure (EU region), encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest (AES-256 managed by Supabase). Per-user isolation is enforced at the PostgreSQL level via Row-Level Security — each user only accesses their own data.

sections.heading: 4. Payments
sections.html: Payments go through Stripe (PCI level 1 compliant). LIBERIA never stores your card number — only a subscription identifier to synchronise your Premium status. You can review and update your payment method via the Stripe customer portal in your settings.

sections.heading: 5. Artificial intelligence
sections.html: When you use the AI assistant or generate a plan, a minimal snapshot of your financial context and preferences is sent to Anthropic to produce a response. Anthropic does not use this data to train its models (see our AI policy). When the AI isn't active, LIBERIA uses a local generator — no data leaves our infrastructure.

sections.heading: 6. Cookies
sections.html: LIBERIA only uses strictly necessary cookies: the Supabase session cookie for your authentication. No advertising cookie, no third-party tracking cookie, no banner to accept.

sections.heading: 7. Your rights (GDPR)
sections.html:
• Access and portability: you can download all your data as JSON from your settings.
  • Deletion: you can permanently delete your account in two clicks — all your data is cascade-deleted.
  • Rectification: you modify your data yourself from the app.
  • Objection: you can disable the anonymous internal counters from your settings.

sections.heading: 8. Retention
sections.html: Your data is kept as long as your account is active. On account deletion, erasure is permanent and irreversible (except for certain accounting retention obligations on Stripe's side, independent of LIBERIA).

sections.heading: 9. No resale, no commercial sharing
sections.html: We don't sell your data. We don't rent it. We don't share it with any advertiser, broker, marketing agency or data broker. That's our commitment, and it stays true as LIBERIA grows.

sections.heading: 10. Sub-processors
sections.html: The only third parties that process your data on our behalf are: Supabase (hosting + database, EU), Stripe (payments, EU/US), Anthropic (AI model, US — conversation snapshots only), Resend (email delivery, EU/US), Vercel (application hosting, EU/US). All operate on our instructions and under standard GDPR contractual clauses.

sections.heading: 11. Contact
sections.html: For any question about your data: privacy@liberia.app. To report a security issue: security@liberia.app.

metadata.title: Terms of service
metadata.description: The rules for using LIBERIA — free trial, subscription without commitment, cancel any time.

sections.heading: 1. Purpose
sections.html: LIBERIA is a personal financial piloting tool meant to help you understand your situation, structure your budget and move toward your goals. The app is published in Geneva (Switzerland) and designed primarily for the Swiss market, with international use possible.

sections.heading: 2. No financial advice
sections.html: The indicators, scores, plans and recommendations shown by LIBERIA — whether from the local generator or the AI assistant — do not constitute financial, tax, legal, or investment advice. They do not come from a qualified professional. Before any important decision, consult an advisor matched to your situation. See also our full disclaimer.

sections.heading: 3. User account
sections.html: You must be at least 18 (or the legal age of majority in your jurisdiction) to create an account. You're responsible for the confidentiality of your password and the activity on your account. You can delete your account at any time from your settings — deletion is permanent and irreversible.

sections.heading: 4. Free trial and subscription
sections.html:
LIBERIA comes with a 14-day free trial. A valid payment method is required to start the trial. After 14 days, your chosen subscription (monthly or yearly) is charged automatically. You can cancel any time from your subscription portal — no justification, no questions.

Anti-abuse: the free trial is limited to one per account. A new subscription after cancellation starts immediately at the standard rate.

sections.heading: 5. Pricing
sections.html:
Two plans, each available monthly or yearly. The 14-day trial is included in all cases (card required at sign-up, no charge during the trial).

  • Standard monthly: 14.95 CHF / month, charged every month after the 14-day trial.
  • Standard yearly: 149 CHF / year (around 12.42 CHF / month, ≈ 30 CHF saved vs monthly), charged once a year.
  • Premium monthly: 24.95 CHF / month, charged every month after the 14-day trial.
  • Premium yearly: 249 CHF / year (around 20.75 CHF / month, ≈ 50 CHF saved vs monthly), charged once a year.

Prices are shown in Swiss francs (CHF), tax inclusive. No hidden fees. There is NO permanent free plan.

sections.heading: 6. Cancellation and withdrawal
sections.html:
You can cancel your subscription any time from your subscription portal (Stripe). Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current period — your access stays active until then. No additional charge will be made.

If you cancel during the 14-day trial, no amount is charged.

sections.heading: 7. Refund
sections.html: Given the digital-service format with immediate access, no refund is due once the period has been paid. For a major technical issue that prevented you from using the app, contact support@liberia.app — we look at each case.

sections.heading: 8. Acceptable use
sections.html: You agree to use LIBERIA in good faith: not attempting to access data that isn't yours, not disrupting the infrastructure, not reusing the service for fraudulent purposes. Abusive use of the AI assistant (excessive volume, off-scope content) can lead to suspension.

sections.heading: 9. Data and privacy
sections.html: See our detailed privacy policy. In short: minimal collection, EU hosting, no resale, full user-side control (GDPR export, two-click deletion).

sections.heading: 10. Liability
sections.html: LIBERIA provides an informational tool. We cannot be held liable for the financial consequences of a decision made solely on the basis of information shown in the app. Any important financial decision stays your sole responsibility.

sections.heading: 11. Changes
sections.html: These terms may evolve. Any substantial modification (price change, new email category, change in data processing) will be notified by email with reasonable notice. Continued use after notification means acceptance.

sections.heading: 12. Applicable law
sections.html: These terms are governed by Swiss law. Any dispute falls under the jurisdiction of the Geneva courts, subject to the mandatory consumer protection provisions applicable in your habitual place of residence.

sections.heading: 13. Contact
sections.html: For any question about your subscription or these terms: support@liberia.app.

metadata.title: Responsible AI policy
metadata.description: How LIBERIA uses AI — assistance and coaching, never regulated financial advice. No training on your data.

aiPolicy.title: An AI that supports you, doesn't replace you.
aiPolicy.intro: LIBERIA's AI assistant is built to help you see clearly, propose concrete actions and adapt its tone to your profile. It is neither a financial advisor, nor a therapist, nor an oracle.

sections.heading: What the AI does
sections.html:
• Reads your declared data. Income, expenses, goals, current plan, coaching preferences. Only what you've entered yourself.
  • Suggests concrete actions. Small weekly steps, budget adjustments, debt prioritisation. Always with a short explanation of why.
  • Adapts tone to your profile. Calm and reassuring, direct and motivating, structured or gradual — you pick the style in your settings.

sections.heading: What the AI does not do
sections.html:
• No regulated advice. No investment recommendation, no personalised tax optimisation, no legal advice. For these topics, the assistant points you to a qualified professional.
  • No financial promise. The AI doesn't guarantee returns, doesn't predict the future, and never pushes you into disproportionate risk.
  • No judgement. The tone is calm, factual, kind. No guilt, no artificial pressure.

sections.heading: Your data and the AI
sections.html:
• No training. Your data is never used to train or re-train an AI model, ours or our providers' (Anthropic).
  • On-demand processing. The AI only receives your data when you ask a question or request a plan. The snapshot sent is minimal and never kept by the LLM provider beyond processing.
  • Local fallback mode. When the assistant isn't wired up, LIBERIA uses a deterministic server-side reply generator — no data leaves our infrastructure.
  • Full erasure. Deleting your account wipes conversation history + all generated plans. You can also delete one conversation at a time from the interface.

sections.heading: Limits and errors
sections.html:
AI models can be wrong, misunderstand nuance, or propose an action ill-suited to your particular situation. Before acting on an important recommendation (repaying a loan, switching insurance, starting an investment), take time to think — and if the stakes are significant, consult a qualified professional.

You can report a problematic answer by replying directly to the weekly recap email or by writing to support@liberia.app.

metadata.title: Disclaimer
metadata.description: Legal disclaimer — LIBERIA is not a financial advisor.

legal.title: Legal disclaimer.
legal.headline: LIBERIA is a personal piloting tool, not a financial advisor.
legal.body1: The indicators, scores and recommendations shown here are informational. They do not constitute financial, tax, legal, or investment advice. Any important decision should be taken with a qualified professional matched to your situation.
legal.body2: LIBERIA cannot be held responsible for a decision made solely on the basis of information shown in the application.

metadata.title: Security & trust
metadata.description: How LIBERIA protects your financial data — encryption, per-user isolation, full user-side control.

securityPage.title: Your finances deserve a healthy frame.
securityPage.intro: We don't promise you "bank-level security" — we tell you how it's built, and you judge. The rule that guides everything: the less we touch your data, the better.

pillars.title: Encryption in transit and at rest
pillars.body: HTTPS required (TLS) between your browser and our servers. Encrypted storage at rest via Supabase Postgres (AES-256 managed by Supabase infra, EU hosting).

pillars.title: Per-user isolation
pillars.body: Every row in your tables (income, expenses, goals, plans, conversations) is filtered by PostgreSQL Row-Level Security. You can only read your own data — the database itself refuses cross-account queries.

pillars.title: No service-role on the browser side
pillars.body: The key that would bypass RLS stays only on the server side. No Stripe, Anthropic, or database secret ships in the browser bundle.

pillars.title: Payments handled by Stripe
pillars.body: We never store your card number. Stripe (PCI level 1 compliant) captures and keeps the information on Stripe's side. We only keep a subscription identifier to synchronise your status.

pillars.title: Signed, idempotent webhook
pillars.body: Stripe events are verified cryptographically before being applied. A delivery replayed by mistake doesn't cause double-processing (deduplication at the database level).

pillars.title: You stay in control
pillars.body: GDPR data export in one click. Permanent account deletion in two clicks. No data is resold — that's our commitment.

sections.heading: What we don't do (on purpose)
sections.html:
• No bank aggregation. LIBERIA works only with voluntary entry. You never connect your bank — less attack surface, more mental clarity.
  • No data resale. No data leaves your account for advertising or commercial purposes. No data partnership.
  • No advertising tracking. No Facebook / Google Ads pixel. No fingerprinting. You can disable the anonymous internal counters from your settings.

sections.heading: Honest limits
sections.html: LIBERIA has neither SOC 2 nor ISO 27001 audit. We're not bank-certified. It's a young app that leans on robust providers (Supabase, Stripe, Vercel) and follows basic OWASP best practices. If your use requires a specific certification, get in touch — we'll document what we can.

sections.heading: Report a vulnerability
sections.html: If you identify a security issue, write to security@liberia.app. We answer within 72 business hours. We prefer that you write to us first before any publication — we acknowledge your help publicly after the fix (responsible disclosure).
